name: Speed Dating Vore App
description:
There is an app that allows predators to meet up with willing prey.

When you sign up, the app will ask you 2 important questions.

  1. Are you Predator or Pray?

And

  1. Are you afraid of Death?

If you answer 'yes', the app will automatically add 'Safe' to your bio.

After that, create your bio and start searching for your Predator or Prey.

All methods of vore are available. Just type it in your bio and start searching. Along with other preferences like male or female Pred/Prey and what anthros.

P.S.: There are two tags to be aware of while using the app. "Fatal" and "Safe"
creator: Autistic Internet Freak
